# archtool

> Auto-wiring dependency injection and Clean Architecture enforcement for Python. Define interfaces, write concrete implementations — archtool scans your modules, discovers interface/implementation pairs, instantiates them, and wires everything together at startup via a two-pass algorithm. Zero boilerplate, zero registration code.

archtool is a Python library (3.10–3.13, MIT) that replaces manual DI wiring with automatic discovery. It enforces Clean Architecture layer boundaries at startup — violations raise an exception before any user code runs. A CLI (`archtool init`, `archtool add-module`) scaffolds new projects and modules.

Install: `pip install archtool`

## Guide

- [Quickstart](https://0nliner.github.io/archtool/guide/quickstart/): Full working project from scratch in 5 minutes — scaffold, add modules, define interfaces, write implementations, wire
- [How it works](https://0nliner.github.io/archtool/guide/concepts/): Two-pass injection algorithm, topological sort, layer enforcement, and the assembly test pattern
- [Module structure](https://0nliner.github.io/archtool/guide/modules/): What goes in interfaces.py, repos.py, services.py and why
- [Built-in layers](https://0nliner.github.io/archtool/guide/layers/): Infrastructure → Domain → Application → Presentation and how to configure them
- [Custom layers](https://0nliner.github.io/archtool/guide/custom_layers/): Defining your own layer hierarchy with ComponentPattern
- [Interface-first design](https://0nliner.github.io/archtool/guide/interface_first/): ABCRepo, ABCService, ABCController, ABCView markers and why interfaces come first
- [Manual registration](https://0nliner.github.io/archtool/guide/manual_registration/): register() for async resources, third-party objects, config, test stubs, conditional implementations
- [CLI](https://0nliner.github.io/archtool/guide/cli/): archtool init, add-module, validate, graph commands
- [FAQ](https://0nliner.github.io/archtool/guide/faq/): Common errors, circular deps, from __future__ import annotations, constructor arguments, async support

## API Reference

- [DependencyInjector](https://0nliner.github.io/archtool/api/dependency_injector/): Constructor params, inject(), register(), get_dependency(), dependencies dict
- [AppModule](https://0nliner.github.io/archtool/api/app_module/): import_path, ignore, validate()
- [Exceptions](https://0nliner.github.io/archtool/api/exceptions/): All archtool exceptions — DependencyDoesNotRegistred, TopLevelLayerUsingException, InstantiationError, DependencyDuplicate, CircularDependencyError, and more

## Examples

- [Basic project](https://0nliner.github.io/archtool/examples/basic/): Single-module and cross-module wiring
- [Nested modules](https://0nliner.github.io/archtool/examples/nested/): payments.gateway, payments.billing as independent bounded contexts
- [FastAPI integration](https://0nliner.github.io/archtool/examples/web_fractal/): archtool with FastAPI lifespan startup

## Optional

- [Why archtool?](https://0nliner.github.io/archtool/why/): Problems with manual DI at scale
- [Comparison](https://0nliner.github.io/archtool/guide/comparison/): vs dependency-injector, injector, manual DI, FastAPI Depends
